name: Pearl Bernice Garrett
other: 420 Lindsay Street, Greensboro, N.C. Major: English. Ambition: College Debating Coach
bio: Pearl Bernice Garrett, known as 'Topsy,' of 420 Lindsay Street, Greensboro, N.C., majored in English with the ambition of becoming a College Debating Coach. She was active in the Choral Society, Debating Society (Vice-President), Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Register Staff, L'Alliance Francaise, and Gamma Tau Honorary Society.

name: Elma Theola Graves
quote: To make the most of life as long as life lives
other: Box 343, Gibsonville, N.C. Major: Home economics. Ambition: Demonstration agent
bio: Elma Theola Graves, 'Chubby,' from Gibsonville, N.C., majored in Home Economics with the ambition of becoming a Demonstration agent. She participated in the Choral Society, W.S.G.A., Home Economics Club, and Y.W.C.A.

name: Paul Edward Gidney
quote: You are now listening to Paul Gidney and his A. & T. Serenaders
other: 100 Hamilton Street, Asheville, N.C. Major: History. Ambition: Instructor
bio: Paul Edward Gidney, nicknamed 'Snoz,' of Asheville, N.C., majored in History and aspired to become an Instructor. He was active in the Band, Sunday School, and Orchestra.

name: Thomas Felton Griswell
quote: The good old candy and pie man
other: Major: Agriculture. Ambition: None
bio: Thomas Felton Griswell, 'Grissy,' majored in Agriculture with no stated ambition. His activities included the Agriculture Association, Y.M.C.A., and Sunday School.

name: Mary Gilmer
quote: Let's make life interesting for others
other: Liberty, N.C. Major: Elementary education. Ambition: Music instructor
bio: Mary Gilmer, 'Mae,' of Liberty, N.C., majored in Elementary Education and aspired to be a Music Instructor. She was active in the Choral Club, Basketball, Zeta Phi Beta Sorority, and Tapping.

name: Cora Madeline Haith
activities: Secretary to Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority
quote: The French had a word for it
other: 400 Stewart Street, Greensboro, N.C. Major: French. Ambition: Librarian
bio: Cora Madeline Haith, 'Choke,' of Greensboro, N.C., majored in French with the ambition of becoming a Librarian. She served as President of W.A.A., was active in Y.W.C.A., and was Secretary of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority.

name: Maurice Q. Godley
quote: Oh, what a fine life may be had on some hundred acres
other: Pantego, N.C. Major: Agriculture. Ambition: Instructor
bio: Maurice Q. Godley, 'Quint,' of Pantego, N.C., majored in Agriculture with the ambition of becoming an Instructor. He participated in Football and Intra-mural sports.

name: Henry Gilbert Harris
other: Candor, N.C. Major: Agriculture. Ambition: Farm demonstrator
bio: Henry Gilbert Harris, 'Red,' of Candor, N.C., majored in Agriculture with the ambition of becoming a Farm demonstrator. He was a member of Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity and the Agriculture Association.

name: Gordon Edward Grady
quote: Let us come out of darkness into the marvelous light—electricity
other: Box 1053, Southern Pines, N.C. Major: Electrical engineering. Ambition: Electrical engineer
bio: Gordon Edward Grady of Southern Pines, N.C., majored in Electrical Engineering and aspired to become an Electrical Engineer. He participated in the College Orchestra and Electrical Club.

name: James Castro Hasty
activities: Vice-President of Gamma Tau Honorary Society and of Pan-Hellenic Council
quote: Versatility is a mark of success
other: Southern Pines, N.C. Major: Mathematics. Ambition: Instructor
bio: James Castro Hasty, 'Professor,' of Southern Pines, N.C., majored in Mathematics with the ambition of becoming an Instructor. He served as President of the Science Club, Vice-President of the Gamma Tau Honorary Society and Pan-Hellenic Council, and was active in Gamma Tau Fraternity, College Band, and Y.M.C.A.

name: Paul Haynes
quote: Goals are not reached by sudden flight, But as a result of long, strenuous efforts
other: Whiteville, N.C. Major: General agriculture
bio: Paul Haynes of Whiteville, N.C., majored in General Agriculture. He was a member of the Band, Class Football, and the Agriculture Association.

name: Napoleon Howard
quote: He has put light on manna' subjects
other: Box 31, Faison, N.C. Major: Industrial arts. Ambition: Business
bio: Napoleon Howard, 'Pol,' of Faison, N.C., majored in Industrial Arts with the ambition of going into Business. He was active in the Technical Club, Gamma Tau Fraternity, and Y.M.C.A.

name: Arthur Headon
quote: We hope you carry that good ole spirit with you
other: 305 Bennett Street, Greensboro, N.C. Major: French. Ambition: Recreation Director
bio: Arthur Headon of Greensboro, N.C., majored in French with the ambition of becoming a Recreation Director. He participated in A.S.U. and Y.M.C.A.

name: Carl E. T. Johnson
other: 222 Chestnut Avenue, Ardmore, Pa. Major: Biological sciences. Ambition: Doctor
bio: Carl E. T. Johnson, 'Hots,' of Ardmore, Pa., majored in Biological Sciences with the ambition of becoming a Doctor. He was Vice-President of the Senior Class, President of the Pan-Hellenic Council, a member of Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity, and active in Track, Football, Y.M.C.A., Choral Society, and Varsity Club.

name: Clarence A. Hughes
quote: Well liked by your friends and instructors
other: 463 Cole Street, Greensboro, N.C. Major: Business administration. Ambition: Business
bio: Clarence A. Hughes of Greensboro, N.C., majored in Business Administration with the ambition of going into Business. He was active in the Dramatic Club, Band, Business Club, Sociology Club, and Phi Beta Sigma Fraternity.

name: Willa Mae Johnson
quote: Your deeds propbecy success and happiness
other: 175 West Kinney Street, Newark, N.J. Major: Commercial education. Ambition: Private secretary
bio: Willa Mae Johnson, 'Bill,' of Newark, N.J., majored in Commercial Education with the ambition of becoming a Private Secretary. She was Class Secretary, Superintendent of Sunday School, member of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority, and active in numerous clubs including the Business Club, W.A.A., Choral Club, and W.S.G.A.

name: Georgia A. Hines
quote: Success means more than passing follies
other: Candor, N.C. Major: Commercial education. Ambition: Successful
bio: Georgia A. Hines, 'Ted,' of Candor, N.C., majored in Commercial Education with the ambition of being Successful. She was a member of the Business Club, Achronian Club, and Birthday Club.

name: Joseph Jordan
other: Major: Agriculture. Ambition: Farmer
bio: Joseph Jordan, 'Joe,' majored in Agriculture with the ambition of becoming a Farmer. He was active in the Agricultural Association, N.F.A., and Omega Psi Phi fraternity.

name: Samuel Hodges
quote: Truly a great life, if you don't weaken
other: Hope Mills, N.C. Major: Vocational agriculture. Ambition: Scientific farmer
bio: Samuel Hodges of Hope Mills, N.C., majored in Vocational Agriculture with the ambition of becoming a Scientific Farmer. He participated in Basketball, Tennis, and was a member of Kappa Alpha Psi Fraternity.

name: Eddie Keith
quote: Skillful bands coordinated with capable brain
other: Route 2, Box 119, Currie, N.C. Major: Industrial Arts. Ambition: Vocational supervisor
bio: Eddie Keith, 'School Boy,' of Currie, N.C., majored in Industrial Arts with the ambition of becoming a Vocational Supervisor. He was active in Y.M.C.A., Kappa Alpha Psi Fraternity, the Annual Staff, and the 'T' Square Club.
